title: elytrigia tauri
intro: Elytrigia tauri, also known as Tauri's wildrye or Elymus tauricus, is a type of perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cellular damage. The health benefits of Elytrigia tauri include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal supplements or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
